title: Promethean
body:
The Promethean SMP is a small SMP I created to try to use the difficulty and gameplay itself to incentivize players to work together, build infrastructure, and survive. It's frustrating, not entirely coherent, and is mostly a passion project. If that's your cup of tea, feel free to join us at: [https://discord.gg/hHmTr3P42u](https://discord.gg/hHmTr3P42u)!
-Luccky
